name: First Touch
body:
Hi {{Name}} 👋 This is Arjun from *Ankit Kumar Academy.*

Saw you're keen to level up your AI skills. We are running a *FREE live demo class* this week for working IT professionals — you'll see a real AI project built live, no charge.

Want me to save you a seat? 🎟️
